title: Infosys announces long-term IT transformation collaboration with Valmet
detailed_summary: Infosys announced a strategic, long-term collaboration with Valmet to modernize Valmet's core IT services and deliver end-to-end IT transformation. The engagement is intended to improve operational efficiency, reduce operational costs, optimize resources, enable proactive enterprise-wide IT operations, and align IT operations with Valmet's business priorities and Lead the Way strategy. Infosys will use Infosys Topaz Fabric and Infosys Cobalt to support AI-led IT operations, cloud modernization, resiliency, and long-term business agility. No contract value or financial terms were disclosed.

key_facts.fact: Infosys announced a strategic, long-term collaboration with Valmet, a global technology leader serving process industries.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Collaborates with Valmet to Reimagine IT Operations with AI Accelerated Transformation

key_facts.fact: Infosys will modernize Valmet's core IT services and deliver end-to-end IT transformation to enhance operational efficiency and align IT operations with business priorities.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Collaborates with Valmet to Reimagine IT Operations with AI Accelerated Transformation

key_facts.fact: The collaboration includes reducing operational costs, optimizing existing resources, and enabling proactive management of enterprise-wide IT operations.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Collaborates with Valmet to Reimagine IT Operations with AI Accelerated Transformation

key_facts.fact: Infosys will leverage Infosys Topaz Fabric, described as a purpose-built, composable and open agentic services suite, to embed intelligence across IT operations.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Collaborates with Valmet to Reimagine IT Operations with AI Accelerated Transformation

key_facts.fact: Infosys will leverage Infosys Cobalt to establish scalable, secure, and future-ready cloud foundations for IT modernization.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Collaborates with Valmet to Reimagine IT Operations with AI Accelerated Transformation

key_facts.fact: No contract value or financial terms were disclosed.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Collaborates with Valmet to Reimagine IT Operations with AI Accelerated Transformation
